title: Energy absorbing bollard â impact absorber
abstract: An energy absorbing bollard includes two different configurations of energy absorbing elements to allow the bollard to effectively absorb both low level and high level impacts. The energy absorbing elements comprise a cartridge including a series of radially disposed impact cells wherein the impact cells are symmetrically disposed in two layers.
claims: Claims 1. A energy absorbing bollard (10) comprising a bollard post (14) surrounded by an energy absorbing cartridge (18), wherein the energy absorbing cartridge (18) provides two different impact characteristics. 2. The bollard (10) as in claim 1, wherein the cartridge (18) comprises a series of radially disposed impact cells (40). 3. The bollard (10) as in claim 2, wherein the impact cells are symmetrically disposed in two layers. 4. The bollard (10) as in claim 2, wherein the impact cells (40) comprise a low impact element (50) with a low impact characteristic and a high impact element (60) with a high impact characteristic. 5. The bollard (10) as in claim 4, wherein the low impact element (50) comprises a C section (52, 54, 56). 6. The bollard (10) as in claim 5 wherein the high impact element (60) comprises a horizontal planar member (62) and an angled planar member (64) disposed at a non-zero angle to the horizontal planar member (62). 7. The bollard (10) as in claim 6, wherein the angled planar member (64) is attached to a vertical member (56) of the low impact element (50). 8. The bollard (10) as in claim 2, wherein the impact cells (40) are disposed between an inner ring (20) and an outer ring (30) of the cartridge (18). 9. The bollard (10) as in claim 8, wherein the impact cells are radially separated by slots (22) in the inner ring (20). 10. The bollard (10) as in claim 3, wherein the impact cells (40) disposed in a first layer of the two layers are upside down I comparison to the impact cells (40) disposed in a second layer of the two layers.
